name: Melody Jerk Off Instructions
description:
Your favorite bot is here for a more personal story…

═════════════════════

Hi there darlings~ you’ve all been so kind, giving my bots so many nice comments and upvotes. I think it’s high time you get a little reward, don’t you?

I was thinking perhaps we could spend a little 1-on-1 time together, so I can really get to know you.

If you’d rather a bit more intense company, you might prefer to talk to Reina. She’s a bit less… soft than me.

I know you might have a hard time relieving yourself to just boring old words, so I went ahead and prepared some spicy pictures just for you, dear!

https://postimg.cc/gallery/xfX1sbb

═════════════════════

═════════════════════

DEVELOPER NOTE:

Yeah, I know this might seem odd. It’s definitely different from the norm, but I wanted to try something new. I’m not ashamed to admit (well I’m a little ashamed but it’s the internet or whatever), that I’ve gotten kinda addicted to JOIs and JOI bots lately, so I decided I’d try to get Reina and Melody to make their own. I don’t really know how these will hold up, so any feedback or bug reports would be great.
creator: M0naM0na
